violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed case of potatoes in the walk in freezer being stored on the floor. Observed case of chicken stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed paper items being stored on the floor at time of inspections. Ex Cups and pizza boxes.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Spatulas were being stored between the wall and stainless steel counter by the upright warmer in the kitchen. These must not be stored there, and stored in an area that is frequently cleaned and sanitized.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the cappuccino machine needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Pizza boxes on the shelf and on top of the upright warmer were not inverted.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The walls in the area where dishes are stored by the mop sink are bare sheet rock. Not a cleanable surface and need to be covered with a cleanable material, or painted/sealed.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
